violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink at the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

The emergency door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by equipment. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The emergency door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
Some floor tiles by the emergency exit door observed area in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment shall have an allergy statement posted in the deli prepared food area for customers to acknowledge. "Please inform your server of any food allergies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Ambient temperature of the preparation unit was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Food items were stored overnight such as cooked chicken, cooked beef and salsa were observed at 44 degrees F. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. NON-TCS food items should be stored on unit until unit hold temperatures of 41 degrees F or below. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment shall have an allergy statement posted in the deli prepared food area for customers to acknowledge. "Please inform your server of any food allergies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

Rice was observed held at rice cooker at 63 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. food item was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

Cooked meats were observed not marked with the date of preparation at the preparation unit. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

Soups located at the 2-door reach-in unit were observed marked with a date that exceeded the 7 days limit for ready to eat foods. Food items were observed dated from 1/2/2024. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment shall have an allergy statement posted in the deli prepared food area for customers to acknowledge. "Please inform your server of any food allergies." New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

Working containers of sugar is not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024
Dead rodent was observed on floor near to mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
Beverages were observed stored on the floor in the basement. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

Ice scoop was observed with their handles in the ice machine. Utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean protected location. The scoop was re-arranged to keep the handle out of the ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024
